scripts.check: node scripts/check_syntax.mjs && node scripts/py_compile_check.mjs && node scripts/check_workflows.mjs && node scripts/check_tracked_leaks.mjs && node scripts/check_history_paths.mjs && node check_public_files.mjs
scripts.test: node --test --test-isolation=none tests/*.test.mjs && python -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_*.py" && node scripts/smoke_test.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm test && npm run build && node scripts/check_dist.mjs
